resources.string: "RetroStatusBar uses the Accessibility Service to show the custom status bar and to detect gestures on the status bar. It also allows you to chose apps you don't want RetroStatusBar to show in. No other Accessibility data is collected and no data shared."
The system did not start the Accessibility Service. Please try again or try restarting your device.
"Please note, on a small number of devices, you may not be able to disable heads up notifications. If this is the case, it is not the app's fault, your device manufacturer has restricted it."
The ADB permission does not modify your device in any way.
Unfortunately, to enable this setting, you need to connect your phone to your computer to grant a permission.
Firstly, follow the instructions here to get setup with ADB:
After ADB is setup, run this command from your computer:
If you use auto brightness, enabling this setting will let you change the brightness level without disabling auto brightness. This does not work on some devices due to Android not letting it.
Android 12 stopped fullscreen detection working. Workarounds are being looked into.
If you believe this is a mistake, send us an email
Shows a battery bar in the status bar
Change the bar color depending on the battery level
No internet connection to fetch the changelog
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
(Requires Android Oreo+) The main slider will automatically change based on the type of audio playing. E.g. while music is playing, the Media slider can become the main slider
The app appears to have been stopped by your device battery optimizations. Make sure battery optimizations are disabled for the app to run smoothly.
Thank you for considering to donate. All donations are appreciated and will help towards extra features being added to the app!
Your contribution will help more features be added to the app.
The Telephone permission is required for dual SIM support. Grant it now?
Android did not start the Notification Service correctly. If no notifications show, try restarting your device.
This is an example of ticker text. You can configure the ticker text style and change its colors.
Sometimes, the gestures area will not hide in fullscreen. Enable this option to make sure it is hidden.
Please confirm your age before continuing
"I confirm that I'm 16 years or older"
No thank you, I want to buy the app
I understand that I will still see ads, but they may not be as relevant to my interests.
Can we continue to use your data for these purposes%1$s?
" as well as for showing personalized ads"
We care about your privacy and data security.
We keep this app %1$s by using third party services.

We use %1$s in this app. These services (including their partners) collect unique identifiers and other personal data. You can change your choice at any time in the app settings. Learn more about these services and your personal data.

We use %1$s in this app. This service (including its partners) collects unique identifiers and other personal data. You can change your choice at any time in the app settings. Learn more about this service and your personal data.
By agreeing, you are confirming that you are over the age of 16.

"We won't collect your data for personalized advertising. Although non-personalized ads don't use mobile ad identifiers for ad targeting, they do still use mobile identifiers for frequency capping and aggregated ad reporting as well as for combating fraud and abuse."
We use the following third party services in this app:
Click on a service to check out its privacy policy%1$s.
" or click the following to check out our app's privacy policy"
Can we continue to use your data to tailor ads for you?
Dragging along the status bar will change brightness or volume. See the Main Slider section for options.
Select apps to disable gestures in
Root is not required. If your device is rooted, you can skip the steps below by tapping this button:
Heads up notifications must be disabled for the ticker text to work well.
This setting must be disabled before uninstalling the app.
AppIntro is a library for making a cool intro in your Android apps.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
Check you are connected to the internet and try again
"This is not the app's fault, it is an Android limitation."
"This is not the app's fault, it is due to your device manufacturer disabling this functionality."
Moves status bar elements around the notch or hole punch, so they are not hidden behind it.
p.license { background:grey; } body { font-family: sans-serif; overflow-wrap: break-word; } pre { background-color: #eeeeee; padding: 1em; white-space: pre-wrap; }
Experience many more features including battery bar, additional status bar modifications, & more
Quickly toggle settings and open your favorite apps with simple gestures on the status bar
Making your status bar more useful
Apply different styles, change the colors & order, and enable or disable icons.
Change brightness and volume with ease by swiping along the status bar
Get a preview of your notifications without obtrusive heads up popups
Required for status bar gestures and to show the custom status bar. No personal data is collected or shared.
Do Not Disturb access must be granted to perform this action
The Modify Settings permission must be granted to perform this action
The following permissions are required to use the app
Vibrate when tapping quick setting tiles
Select a place on the status bar to fully expand the quick settings panel from
Please take a moment to leave a rating!
If you have a moment, please tell us what can be improved
Allows status bar gestures to be performed while in fullscreen
Shows an indicator when swiping along the status bar
Shows an indicator when toggling a setting, e.g. rotation
Useful if your screen has rounded corners

"The Main slider is used when swiping along the status bar. The Main and Enabled items are used for the \"Auto change main slider\" setting. Drag an item into the Disabled section to disable it completely."
Make the brightness easier to control at lower levels

"Due to Android limitations, this custom status bar may not show in some apps, and you may see the original status bar. Enabling this option will always show the custom status bar, but it may not be hidden in some fullscreen apps. This is an Android limitation and not the app's fault."
Here you can apply a new status bar, customise every part of it, and apply styles such as iOS.
Note: transparent background is not possible.
Change the order of items in the status bar
An ADB permission is required to enable this setting. Would you like to see how to grant it?
Here you can keep your original status bar and change which icons are shown.
This does not work on all devices.
The Phone permission is required to show the network type in the status bar. Grant it now?
Show network type in status bar
Select which system icons to show in the status bar
Briefly show notification text in the status bar when a notification arrives
Here you can customise the status bar. Select the option you would prefer.
Tap here to suggest a new style
Shows example notifications to let you see your defined styles
Select apps to not use the ticker text notifications for
Select notification categories to not use the ticker text for. For example: alarms and phone calls
The number of milliseconds a new ticker text will stay on the first text line for before animating. Gives you time to focus on the ticker text before it starts animating.
Select the priority of notifications to show. A lower priority will show more notifications.
A lower priority will show more notifications
Changes the speed of the ticker animation
The ticker text will appear under the status bar. Useful if your phone has a large notch.
Some phones stop apps from running in the background. If the app stops working, battery optimization must be disabled for RetroStatusBar to allow it to work normally.
Swipe along the status bar to change the brightness
Head into each section to enable or disable app features
Only high priority notifications will be shown in the ticker text. To show all notifications, tap here and select a lower priority.
Vibrate when a gesture is performed
Volume Styles lets you customize your volume panel with loads of styles
"System Icons and Notifications can't be in the center."
"System Icons and Notifications can't be in the same position."
